title: Day 2 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these four sentences: 

Sentence 1 - その　りょうり　は　なん　ですか。(Sono ryoori wa nan deska?) = What is that dish?

Sentence 2 - とんかつ　です。(Tonkatsu des) = It's tonkatsu (pork cutlet).

Sentence 3 - この　にく　は　なんの　にく　ですか。(Kono niku wa nan no niku deska?) = What type of meat is this?

Sentence 4 - ぎゅうにく　です。(Gyuuniku des) = It's beef.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
